meanings.usage: enter for 表示报名参加比赛或活动
形容能引起兴趣或好奇的事物
形容布置有序、干净利落
跨越河流或障碍的建筑
指植物生长或培育植物

examples.en: Nearly everybody enters for 'The Nicest Garden Competition' each year.
examples.zh: 几乎每个人都每年报名参加'最佳花园竞赛'。

examples.en: Bill Frith's garden is larger than Joe's.
examples.zh: 比尔·弗里斯的花园比乔的更大。

examples.en: He has built a wooden bridge over a pool.
examples.zh: 他在池塘上建了一座木桥。

examples.en: He has built a wooden bridge over a pool.
examples.zh: 他在池塘上建了一座木桥。

examples.en: I always win a little prize for the worst garden in the town!
examples.zh: 我总是因为镇上最差的花园而获得一个小奖品！

examples.en: Why is Joe's garden the most beautiful one in the town?
examples.zh: 为什么乔的花园是镇上最美丽的一个？

examples.en: Joe Sanders has the most beautiful garden in our town.
examples.zh: 乔·桑德斯拥有我们镇上最美丽的花园。

examples.en: Bill grows more flowers and vegetables.
examples.zh: 比尔种了更多的花和蔬菜。

grammar.title: 形容词最高级 (Superlative Degree)
grammar.definition: 表示三个或以上事物中最...的，用最高级形式，前面通常加the
grammar.usage: 用于比较多个事物，指出最突出的一个

examples.en: Joe Sanders has the most beautiful garden in our town.
examples.zh: 乔·桑德斯拥有我们镇上最美丽的花园。

examples.en: I always win a little prize for the worst garden in the town!
examples.zh: 我总是因为镇上最差的花园而获得一个小奖品！

grammar.title: 形容词比较级 (Comparative Degree)
grammar.definition: 用于两者之间的比较，表示更...的
grammar.structure: 形容词比较级 + than + 比较对象

examples.en: Bill Frith's garden is larger than Joe's.
examples.zh: 比尔·弗里斯的花园比乔的更大。

grammar.title: 现在完成时 (Present Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去发生的行为对现在造成的影响，或从过去持续到现在的动作
grammar.usage: 描述已完成的动作，强调结果

examples.en: He has built a wooden bridge over a pool.
examples.zh: 他在池塘上建了一座木桥。

sentencePatterns.pattern: S + has the + 最高级 + 名词 + in + 地点

original.en: Joe Sanders has the most beautiful garden in our town.
original.zh: 乔·桑德斯拥有我们镇上最美丽的花园。

imitations.en: Mary has the longest hair in our class.
imitations.zh: 玛丽在我们班有最长的头发。

imitations.en: This is the most expensive restaurant in the city.
imitations.zh: 这是这座城市最昂贵的餐厅。

sentencePatterns.pattern: S + 形容词比较级 + than + 对象

original.en: Bill Frith's garden is larger than Joe's.
original.zh: 比尔·弗里斯的花园比乔的更大。

imitations.en: This book is more interesting than that one.
imitations.zh: 这本书比那本书更有趣。

imitations.en: My sister is taller than me.

original.en: He has made neat paths and has built a wooden bridge over a pool.
original.zh: 他修建了整洁的小路，并在池塘上建了一座木桥。

imitations.en: She has written three letters today.

sentencePatterns.pattern: S + always + 动词一般现在时 + ..., and + S + always + 动词一般现在时 + ...

original.en: Every year I enter for the garden competition too, and I always win a little prize.
original.zh: 每年我也报名参加花园竞赛，而我总是获得一个小奖品。

imitations.en: She studies hard, and she always gets good grades.
imitations.zh: 她努力学习，而且总是取得好成绩。

imitations.en: He goes to the gym every day, and he always feels energetic.
imitations.zh: 他每天去健身房，而且总是精力充沛。
